svg.title: Xerox 560 CPU block diagram
svg.desc: High-level block diagram of the Xerox 560 CPU showing the microcode control unit, datapath registers and ALU, and memory interface with internal buses

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are TEMP0 and TEMP1 used for in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('How does the microcode store work in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('How does interrupt handling work in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('What does the micro program counter do in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('How does instruction dispatch work in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('What are the inputs to the branch mux in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the register file in the Xerox 560')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the ALU in the Xerox 560. Why is it 33-bit?')
sendPrompt('What does the barrel shifter do in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('What are the MAR and IA registers in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('What are the IR and PSW registers in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('What is the MDR in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('How does the MAP RAM work in the Xerox 560?')
sendPrompt('What is the main memory capacity and organisation of the Xerox 560?')
